adCopyPlan.benefitBanner: BASIC SALARY + DAILY OVERTIME UP TO 4 HOURS

reasons: Recommended STRUCTURED_PROFESSIONAL for 5 position(s), ~5 headcount, 2 benefit(s), 3 interview event(s).
High-Density scored low: 5 positions / ~5 headcount does not justify a vacancy table.

results.blockReason: Visual QA stayed below 95/100 after 3 iterations (best score: 89). Defects: Agency identity is placed at the top and again at the bottom footer which is a duplication defect for STRUCTURED_PROFESSIONAL archetype.; IMPROVE_SPACING; Agency identity appears only in the footer but could be slightly more prominent for trust; The email contact bubble's yellow contrasts well but is slightly small compared to the phone number; The banner for client interview dates uses a slanted background which may slightly reduce readability compared to fully horizontal bars

Visual QA stayed below 95/100 after 3 iterations (best score: 88). Defects: IMPROVE_CONTRAST: The smaller yellow text 'All applicants must have experience...' is low contrast on the background and hard to read.; IMPROVE_SPACING: Crowding in multi-line headline causes slight tension at top of text block.; OTHER: Red underline under 'OIL & GAS - BILFINGER' seems unnecessary and visually distracting, disrupting clean text presentation.; Agency identity appears both at the top (logo small but present near contact) and in the footer, which is redundant in VISUAL_HERO archetype.; The small red underline under 'IN SAUDI ARABIA' looks like a visual defect or accidental graphic that does not add value.; Agency identity is somewhat prominent near the bottom but not duplicated at the top, so no duplication defect.; Slightly dense text in the positions list could use improved spacing for better readability.

Visual QA stayed below 95/100 after 3 iterations (best score: 94). Defects: UNJUSTIFIED_DEAD_CANVAS: large empty/white area in the lower middle and upper area below the headline wasting premium candidate attention canvas; NO_CANDIDATE_FACING_HOOK: candidate hook not visually emphasized as the dominant headline; 'BILFINGER SHUTDOWN PROJECT IN SAUDI ARABIA' is present but visually same size as next text lines; IMPROVE_SPACING: tabular blocks and interview date buttons are visually cramped and lack balanced vertical spacing; IMPROVE_CTA: contact phone and email CTA are small and visually subordinate on small mobile screens, phone icon also too small; IMPROVE_CONTRAST: light green check marks on pale green background panel are low contrast and require stronger distinction; Dead canvas above the green top border appears unjustified on Instagram format; IMPROVE_SPACING

Visual QA stayed below 95/100 after 3 iterations (best score: 93). Defects: Agency identity is shown at the top and bottom which is unnecessary for Instagram post but allowed for DTP_NEWSPAPER archetype.; Agency identity is repeated prominently at the top and bottom, but allowed as this is a DTP_NEWSPAPER archetype; The advertisement is purely typographic with no imagery, which fits the DTP_NEWSPAPER archetype so imagery score is low but correct; Agency name/logo repeats at both top and bottom which is allowed for DTP_NEWSPAPER but general presence of the top header slightly wastes prime candidate attention real estate
